name: Bod Australia Limited
summary: Bod Australia Limited operates as a cannabis centric healthcare company in Australia, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Medical, OTC CBD/Hemp, and OTC Herbals. It offers medicinal cannabis, cannabidiol (CBD), and hemp healthcare products. The company has a collaboration agreement with Drug Science UK to assess the efficacy of its medicinal cannabis, MediCabilis in managing symptoms associated with the long term impact of SARS-CoV-2. Bod Australia Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Double Bay, Australia.
